name_en: Ministry of Economic Affairs and Finance
description: Iran's Ministry of Economic Affairs and Finance (Vezarat-e Omur-e Eqtesadi va Daraii) manages the state budget, tax policy, financial regulation, and oversees state-owned enterprises. Key ministers: Ali Tayyebnia (2013–2017), Masoud Karbasian (2017–2018), Farhad Dejpasand (2018–2021), Ehsan Khandouzi (2021–2024), [Abdolnaser Hemmati](/people/abdolnaser-hemmati) (2024, briefly).
